programme.desc: Detective Tutuola comes across leaked security footage of a violent domestic dispute in a parking garage showing a sportscaster hitting his girlfriend. Benson investigates the couple's lifestyle and history while the girlfriend pushes back.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Agent Provacateur
programme.desc: A young girl sneaks out of her house to meet a movie star who invited her to a party. Later that night, a patrolman finds her in an alley, sexually assaulted and barely alive. Benson suspects the movie star and his manager are covering up the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Perverted Justice
programme.desc: Bayard Ellis takes on the case of a man incarcerated for incest and rape whose daughter, the victim and star witness when she was a child, wants to recant her testimony and set her father free.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Forty-One Witnesses
programme.desc: A woman is followed home and raped outside her building, where several neighbors witness the crime but fail to call for help.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Revenge
programme.desc: A string of break-in assaults grows more violent as the cops investigate an online incel group to identify a suspect.

programme.title: Modern Family: Lifetime Supply
programme.desc: When Phil misses the call from his doctor's office with his test results, he automatically jumps to conclusions and starts saying his goodbyes. Javier pops up unannounced again and takes Manny to the horse races for a belated birthday celebration.

programme.title: Modern Family: Virgin Territory
programme.desc: It's a day of disturbing realizations when Mitchell manages to ruin one of Jay's proudest golf moments, Phil overhears something that may forever change how he sees his little girl and Gloria stumbles upon Claire's dangerous little secret.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Butler's Escape
programme.desc: Luke wants to quit magic but Phil cannot accept it. Gloria's new pregnancy symptoms include snoring and she is keeping the whole house up.

programme.title: Modern Family: Party Crasher
programme.desc: With the baby coming soon, Jay and Gloria go to great lengths to throw Manny an extra special surprise party for his 14th birthday.

programme.title: Modern Family: Goodnight Gracie

programme.title: Modern Family: And One to Grow On
programme.desc: Phil tricks Luke into taking a dance class, but the jokes on him when the white lie indirectly lands him in the slammer. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria are throwing birthday parties for both Manny and Joe.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Monogamy
programme.desc: After a pregnant woman is viciously attacked and found unconscious with her unborn child missing, the detectives learn that she was having an affair.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Night
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the rape and murder of a woman who is found near a nightclub.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Smut
programme.desc: Detective Benson and Detective Stabler try to catch Eric Lutz, a man who has been beating and raping women. While investigating Lutz, the detectives find amateur pornography on his computer and attempt to track down the women in the videos.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Anchor

programme.title: Movie: Tempted by Danger
programme.desc: A woman sets up her successful but work obsessed sister up with a promising new hire in the hopes of balancing her life.

programme.title: Movie: All My Husband's Wives

programme.desc: A single mother who isn't ready to date hires an escort to pose as her boyfriend at a work event. But it soon becomes evident that she hired a pathological liar with a disturbing dark past, who has no intention of leaving her.

programme.title: The Closer: Elysian Fields
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a man who, 10 years ago, was the lead suspect in the murder of two girls. The state of the body indicates he was dragged behind a truck a full day before being shot twice in the head and dumped in Elysian Park.

programme.title: The Closer: Identity Theft
programme.desc: A confessed murderer gets details of the crime wrong during his allocution, causing Brenda to re-open the case. Her first thought is that he is trying to cover for his schizophrenic son, whose doctor was the victim.

programme.title: The Closer: Smells Like Murder
programme.desc: A large cooler with a body stuffed inside leads Brenda in search of suspects. Gabriel is studying for the detective exam, so Brenda uses the case as a teaching tool.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the mysterious disappearance and possible murder of a 20-year-old single mother, and must retrace her final steps to solve the mystery.

programme.title: The First 48: Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: In Cleveland, detectives investigate the murder of a 23-year-old mother found burned in the backyard of an abandoned house.

programme.title: The First 48: Innocent Bystander/ Partners in Crime
programme.desc: A man is stabbed at a strip mall in the middle of the night and surveillance video captures the murder, but it leaves more questions than answers.

programme.title: The First 48: Run and Gun/ Lonesome Highway
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Det. Maggie Darling is on the hunt for the killers who gunned down a recent high school graduate. Then, in Dallas, Det. Steve David races to identify a woman found shot and dumped on the highway.

programme.title: The First 48: Fatal Call
programme.desc: When a Dallas man is found shot to death in an apartment complex, the homicide team must rely on the eyes of the community to help solve the case.

programme.title: The First 48: Hit List/ Hand in Hand
programme.desc: In Miami, detectives investigate the murder of a 20-year-old male gunned down in the street in broad daylight. In DeKalb County, a 20-year-old man is shot dead while walking his girlfriend home at night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Amazoned Out
programme.desc: Superfans Molly and Nate are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest, a place that's taken down the best of the best. Nate and Molly lean on lessons learned from their couches to push through torrential rain, relentless bugs, and extreme sleep deprivation.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Croc Shock
programme.desc: As temperatures soar, survivalists try to hunt while being hunted themselves. At Camp Murder Puddle, the group fights off a night attack by aggressive crocodiles. A team in turmoil leads to the first self-banishment of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: The Barehanded Killer
programme.desc: Kate is slammed by Africa's wrath after self-banishing. Bulent scores with his bare hands, and Makani may have to put aside her vegan beliefs to survive. Wes and Gwen's first big food win turns into a fail.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: No Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: What the Duck?
programme.desc: In Mexico's unforgiving, cenote-covered landscape, two fan survivalists are dropped on an island filled with venomous coral snakes, territorial jaguars, blood-sucking chiquistas and a duck named Henry that they desperately want to eat for dinner.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Foreign Exchange: Dropped in Croatia
Naked and Afraid: Little Person, Big Challenge
programme.desc: Underestimated his whole life, a survivalist with dwarfism tries to prove himself in the Amazon but struggles against predators and his partner.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: No Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Foreign Exchange: Dropped in Croatia
Naked and Afraid: Honduran Hell
programme.desc: In the mountainous rainforest of Honduras, a survivalist with an unusual past is paired with a hard-headed police detective, but predatorial jaguars, swarms of fire ants and a debilitating injury threaten their challenge.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Family Affair
programme.desc: Two weeks into the King Crab season, the fleet is already behind after a government shutdown and now a massive arctic storm. A harrowing Coast Guard airlift must abort with 100-knot winds whipping over the grounds.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Coast Guard Heroes
programme.desc: A USCG swimmer, pilot and captain, along with Sig, Keith, Bill, Casey, Jake and Sean give an insider's look at the scariest Bering Sea rescues. Many lives are saved and sadly, a few aren't.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Battle Scars
programme.desc: Scars still fresh from a harrowing season on the Bering Sea, and battered by a never-before-seen supermoon storm, the captains reveal the most critical decisions they've made and how those choices and actions have made them the captains they are today.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Troll's Choice Rolls-Royce
programme.desc: When Richard 'accidentally' buys $92K worth of cars at an auction, his bookkeeper sister insists he flip all five cars in one week. Some go more easily and profitably than others but it's a weirdly built Rolls Royce that even Aaron has a hard time fixing.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Cool Kingwood/ Retro Replicar
programme.desc: Aaron and crew turn an ugly duckling '71 Chevy Kingwood station wagon into the cool '70s hot rod dragster it was meant to be. Richard pries a 1980 MG Replicar from a husband reluctant to part with it. The Grill books its first musical act.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast Moving F100
programme.desc: Aaron's not impressed by the '72 Ford Pantera Richard picks up, but he and the Monkeys have fun bringing a Ford F100 truck back to life. Then, they head to Tennessee to try to buy back two pieces of Gas Monkey history: a ratrod and a panhead motorcycle.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Super Sonic Camero, Part II
programme.desc: The Monkey's go super big with their first corporate client Sonic Drive-In to build a promotional 68 Camaro SS convertible. But with only days left until delivery, Richard might miss out on a huge pay day, and tarnish his reputation.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dale Jr.'s Sick Nomad
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey crew build NASCAR royalty Dale Earnhardt Jr. a 1956 Chevy Nomad. While Richard and Aaron travel to Dale Jr's Carolina home with the Nomad, the crew finds ways to cool off in the Texas heat.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Aaron's Falcon Racecar
programme.desc: Aaron falls in love with and buys a famous '63 Ford Falcon race car off Richard, but will the original owner be impressed by Aaron's Gas Money style? Meanwhile, Richard flips a 1919 Nash and an unusually painted truck.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part II
programme.desc: With a 10K-a-day penalty looming, Richard can't afford to lose any more time on the two Firebirds' concourse restoration, but by the end of the project, the garage will be short two Monkeys. Richard flips a '49 Mercury that comes complete with passenger.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Jacked-Up Jeep
programme.desc: Aaron and the Gas Monkey crew overhaul a Jeep in 24 hours to surprise a friend. Richard flips a funky gull-winged Bricklin. Daphne convinces a reluctant Richard to hire his nephew. Dennis and Richard argue over how best to sell their COPO Camaros.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '48 Chevy Fleetmaster
programme.desc: Richard gets ripped off on a '74 Corvette. A Chevy and 'Scarface' worthy '63 Caddy are auctioned off.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part II
programme.desc: When Richard snaps back to his senses, he puts the monkeys back on track and they must finish the '31 Chopped Model A in ten days. It doesn't go without a lot of strife. Meanwhile, Richard and Dennis argue over a Holy Grail find of a '64 ½ Mustang.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Second City Hustlers
programme.desc: As their battle with Chicago approaches, the MSO scrambles to fix Heifer after losing her to a fender bender. JJ finds a '65 Malibu they can use, but Chicago is stacked with fast cars and street sense, so running an unknown may be out of the question.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Paul and Karine: Our Continuing Journey
programme.desc: A look back at the highs and lows of Paul and Karine's journey.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Countdown to the New Season
programme.desc: Relive what Ashley and Jay, Chantel and Pedro, Elizabeth and Andrei, Russ and Pao, Nicole and Azan and Colt and Larissa went through for love. Plus, get a sneak peek at the upcoming season.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: What Goes Around, Comes Around
programme.desc: Colt visits a new love in secret. Angela is urged to seek legal advice about her relationship with Michael. Larissa's future in the US is in jeopardy. Andrei makes a sudden announcement to Elizabeth's family. Kalani asks Asuelu to change his priorities.

programme.title: sMothered: My Gift to You
programme.desc: Cher and Dawn are officially triplets, now that Baby Belle is in the world. Mary's shocking graduation gift to Brittani turns heads at her graduation party. Laurie pressures Miguel to hurry up and propose to Sarah. Marcie inspires Alena to drive.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Pillow Talk: What Goes Around, Comes Around
programme.desc: Colt visits a new love in secret. Angela is urged to seek legal advice about her relationship with Michael. Larissa's future in the US is in jeopardy. Andrei makes a sudden announcement to Elizabeth's family. Kalani asks Asuelu to change his priorities.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Pillow Talk: What Goes Around, Comes Around
programme.desc: Colt visits a new love in secret. Angela is urged to seek legal advice about her relationship with Michael. Larissa's future in the US is in jeopardy. Andrei makes a sudden announcement to Elizabeth's family. Kalani asks Asuelu to change his priorities.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Line in the Sand
programme.desc: Tensions rise as Larry's cousin confronts Jenny. Patrick makes a last ditch effort to win over Myriam. Sean returns to Ohio uncertain about his future with Abby.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Karine has a big decision ahead of her. Larry has an important question for Jenny. Cortney worries about the future as she leaves Spain. Darcey and Jesse share an emotional goodbye, and Sean returns to Haiti to see if Abby has kept her promise.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Holding on and Letting Go
programme.desc: Courtney struggles to pay attention to the big boys when they celebrate their combo birthday party and must deal with her separation anxiety when it comes to the babies. Eric's plan to save the farm puts him at odds with Courtney.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: New Couples, New Journeys
programme.desc: Using a unique 90 Day Fiancé visa, six foreigners will travel to the US to live with their overseas fiancés for the first time. Each couple will have just 90 days to decide to get married or send their international mate home.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I'm Home America!
programme.desc: Evelin pushes Justin to introduce her to his family. At Yamir's album release party his manager throws his private life into the public eye. Mohamed meets Danielle's skeptical son. Daya questions her engagement ring. Plus, meet a new couple Danny and Amy.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Watch You Like a Hawk
programme.desc: Danny misses Amy's first day in America and Justin shocks relatives with news of his engagement. Also, Mohamed meets the rest of Danielle's family and Daya meets Brett's daughter for the first time. Plus, meet new couple Jason and Cassia.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Touchdown!
programme.desc: Amy confronts Danny about his overbearing family. Mohamed learns the meaning of 'hooking up.' Jason travels to Brazil, still uncertain if Cassia will meet him. Yamir arrives in the U.S. and Chelsea's parents have many questions about the couple's future.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Mo' Money, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Danielle fears Mohamed may leave, as her family grows skeptical. Justin sees his family for the first time since revealing his secret. Cassia fights with Jason about trust. Danny's brother ruins date night with Amy. Yamir's move yields devastating news.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Fears, Family, Future
programme.desc: Justin and Evelin invite Jake and Jen over for dinner. Daya confronts Brett about Cassidy's behaviour. Amy's mom arrives from South Africa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Have To Tell You Something
programme.desc: Jason and Cassia struggle with Jason's work schedule and the wedding budget. Also, Danielle breaks bad news to Mohamed and Evelin bonds with Justin's Mom. Plus, Brett's skeptical friend Sue finally meets Daya.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Going Once, Going Twice...Gone?
programme.desc: Danny and Amy's families meet; Cassia breaks down during a fight with Jason; Justin surprises Evelin and his mother.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Red Flags
programme.desc: Mohamed hopes he is making the right choice. Danny's brothers pass him the sex torch. Cassia confronts Jason's skeptical brother when meeting his family for the first time. Brett's mom causes Brett and Daya to question if they should get married.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I'm Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: Chelsea panics before the wedding. Jason and Cassia aim to resolve their relationship problems in Las Vegas. Mohamed goes AWOL on Danielle. Brett has to choose between Daya and his mom. Evelin continues to bond with Justin's family.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLVI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate some 'school spirit', check out some 'above ground fools', and expect the very expected with 'yup'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob's Parents
programme.desc: Patty and Gene, Rob's parents, come to the set to watch videos of their kids' pranks.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ty Dolla Sign
programme.desc: Hip hop and R&B singer Ty Dolla $ign joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to go to some Side Shows, do some Neck Prep and find some hot Porta-Parties.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nick Swisher
programme.desc: Professional baseball's Nick Swisher is here with Rob for a little 'Bro Bonding,' play a game of 'Dude or Bro' and learn how to party with some 'Bro-Ma's.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXXXIX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo earn a gold medal in 'ginastics', study some beasts that are 'wildly intelligent', and learn what trends are 'hot in China'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wiz Khalifa
programme.desc: Rapper Wiz Khalifa guest stars and he'll discuss with Rob why Grass Is Your Friend and the joys of Human Magnets. The fan favourite, Makeshift Thrill Rides, returns to the show.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling L
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some Bro Burials, hang with a crew of Lil' Trunkies and teach us a trend called Speed Bumping.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lyndie Greenwood
programme.desc: 'Sleepy Hollow's' Lyndie Greenwood joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to check out some terrifying 'everyday demons,' and laugh at some hilarious hockey 'puck ups.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness motorcycle revenge in Moto-Cide. Watch some unevolved Cave People, and experience twice the pain in Adding Injury to Injury.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Trina
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steele welcome legendary rapper Trina to discuss what it means to be da baddest, girls who shine bright in diamond dolls, and why sometimes you just gotta let 'em fight.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jason Aldean
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome country music megastar Jason Aldean as they head on down some 'dirt roads', bring a glass of water to a bunch of 'whiskey drowners', and witness the nightmare of 'bad dream houses'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Carmen Electra
programme.desc: Carmen Electra shows what real 'screamers' are all about and does sexercise.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the 'Running Man Challenge,' explore the fear known as 'Crap-nophobia' and learn what it means to be 'Saved to Death.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Yachty
programme.desc: Hip hop superstar Lil Yachty joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to check out what's going on in the Yachty Club, celebrate some style trailblazers, and stay focused with the unfazed clan.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo test their criminal skills in 'The Con-Bine,' get a little handsy with 'Freaks in the Streets,' and discover the weird underground culture of 'Sub-Humans.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jamie Bestwick
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by BMX legend Jamie Bestwick to experience some serious 'very hurt,' keep kids in their place with 'youth slayers' and get over-caffeinated with 'rothrocked.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some 'man dolphins,' hit some red 'bullseyes' and get wet in the category 'dammmmp Daniel.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dominic Monaghan
programme.desc: Dominic Monaghan stops by the studio to watch innocent bystanders get 'Water Damaged.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Rob breaks down Man-kinis; Matt Schlager demonstrates how to fall with your face first.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Mike Holston II
programme.desc: Animal specialist Mike Holston re-joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to check out some cheeky monkeys, try and get over their critterphobia and try to keep some rope-a-dopes grounded.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Ridiculousness 500
programme.desc: This episode celebrates the world of NASCAR, including: a salute to Pass Masters, an intro to NASCAR Exits and what happens when people get Pavemental.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jordan Clarkson
programme.desc: Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson hangs out with Rob, Steelo and Chanel. They throw down Jammies, observe the Tongue Cam and learn about Gettin' Laked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling dodge some 'no look slaps,' hit the 'sensi-button' and experience the drama of 'the circle of life.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: TJ Lavin
programme.desc: BMX rider and MTV host TJ Lavin stops by to learn about Flinstoning, shirtless manplay and animal prodigies.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Happy Everything Episode
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through 'Black and Blue Friday,' 'Gettin' Ugly,' with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some 'Human Driedels.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Leona Lewis
programme.desc: Tonight the crew is joined by multi-platinum singer and songwriter Leona Lewis to watch some of her fellow 'aisle trolls' and be misunderstood while 'speaking Leonese.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Star is Scorned/ Senior Moment
programme.desc: When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily. Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Speechless

programme.desc: Guests include YouTube sensation Alex Wassabi and NBA star Ben Simmons.

programme.title: Movie: Lemony Snicket's a Series of Unfortunate Events

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Ross and Monica's grandmother dies; Ross falls into an open grave and hurts his back.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Mrs. Bing
programme.desc: Chandler's mother stirs up controversy when she kisses Ross; Rachel tries writing a novel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Dozen Lasagnas
programme.desc: Monica is stuck with a dozen lasagnas; Paolo hits on Phoebe when he gets a massage.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Boobies
programme.desc: When Chandler sees Rachel half-naked, she tries to get even by catching him in the shower.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Stoned Guy
programme.desc: Ross asks Joey for advice on how to 'talk dirty' to girls. Monica interviews for a chef's position, only the restaurant owner is completely high. Chandler gets a long awaited promotion at his company.

programme.title: Mom: Chicken Nuggets and a Triple Homicide
programme.desc: In order to get the family back together, Christy and Bonnie rent a house with a colourful past. Meanwhile, Bonnie tries to broker peace between Christy and Alvin.

programme.title: Mom: Forged Resumes and the Recommended Dosage
programme.desc: While Christy tries to get to the bottom of Violet's erratic behaviour, Bonnie attempts to get a job.

programme.title: Mom: Kimchi and a Monkey Playing Harmonica
programme.desc: Christy has mixed feelings about Baxter's new relationship with Candace. Meanwhile, things between Bonnie and Alvin heat up.

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Eyes and a Wet Brad Pitt
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie are in the lap of luxury when Christy's wealthy sponsee, Jill, asks them to keep her company on her first night out of rehab.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Grand Slam
programme.desc: Carmen's new feminist friend challenges George to see his daughter in a new light.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Needs Anchor Management
programme.desc: When Angie meets an old flame who is now a news anchor, George becomes jealous.

programme.title: Full House: Gotta Dance
programme.desc: Stephanie thinks she wants a career as a professional dancer; Rebecca wants a baby shower.

programme.title: Full House: Nicky and/ or Alexander
programme.desc: While Rebecca returns home after the birth of the twins, Danny gets a new co-host.

programme.title: Full House: Bachelor of the Month
programme.desc: When Danny becomes 'Bachelor of the Month', he is suddenly desired by lots of women.

programme.title: Full House: Easy Rider
programme.desc: Michelle wants Joey to teach her to ride a bicycle but blames him when she falls.

programme.title: Full House: Sisters in Crime
programme.desc: D.J. sneaks out to the movies with Stephanie and Michelle to meet a boy she likes.

programme.title: Full House: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Michelle discusses her mischievousness with her good/ bad conscience before misbehaving.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Friendship Day
programme.desc: While celebrating Friendship Day, the pups spring into action to prevent Mayor Humdinger from ruining Adventure Bay's reputation as the friendliest town on the map.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Kitty Rescue Crew/ Pups Save an Ostrich
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger makes fake emergencies for his kitties to save so they appear better then the PAW Patrol. The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Flying Food/ Pups Save a Ferris Wheel
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's delivery drones have gone out of control, and now they are air-dropping food everywhere. Mayor Humdinger steals Adventure Bay's Ferris Wheel.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups and the Pirate Treasure
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot accidentally stumbles into a secret cavern that was once a pirate's hideout. When the PAW Patrol rescues him, they find an incomplete treasure map that leads to a sunken pirate treasure.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Happy Birthday Blue
programme.desc: It's Blue's birthday! We play Blue's Clues to figure out what present Blue wants for her birthday. While we look for Clues, we help Josh get ready for the party by observing patterns and taking a trip to Joe's Present Store.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Raise the PAW Patroller/ Pups Save the Crows
programme.desc: The Pups are able to raise their rig after Danny sinks the Paw Patroller. Ryder and the Pups pair up with Alex and his mini patrol to retrieve mysteriously missing items.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Squirrels/ Pups Save a Roo
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard. It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a Roo and the day.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Dragon/ Pups Save the Three Little Pigs
programme.desc: A fantasy fire breathing dragon comes to life and won't let Ryder and pups into the lookout so Paw Patrol takes to the air patroller. The Paw Patrol help three little pigs build new houses after theirs mysteriously disappear.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save an Antarctic Martian/Pups Save the Maze Explorers
programme.desc: Travelling Travis is on another great adventure when he lands in Antarctica but believes he's actually on Mars!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snooze You Lose/ Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Dark and Story Night/ Sand Hassles
programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubbletown/Girls’ Night Out
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown Bubbletown. Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a diner. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Encounter/ Car Trouble
programme.desc: In Miami, detectives work the murder of a hard working janitor, brutally stabbed to death in his own apartment. In Birmingham, detectives investigate the murder of a man walking home after fixing a friend's car.

programme.title: After the First 48: Into the Woods
programme.desc: After a 17-year-old girl is found with a bullet through the back of her head in the woods of Katy, Texas, a young man comes forward claiming to be an eyewitness. Investigators are shocked by the unusual deal he's made with the DA.

programme.title: The First 48: Moment of Truth/ Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: In Dallas, a woman is shot while sitting in her car. Det. Eddie Ibarra and the team focus on two suspects swept up in a robbery investigation. In Detroit, a young woman and her daughter are shot dead in their apartment.

programme.title: The First 48: Bicycle Bandits/ First Shot
programme.desc: In Miami, a recent high-school graduate is gunned down and left to die in his father's arms. Sgt. Eunice Cooper tries to track down the culprits. Elsewhere, Det. Jenny Luke is on the trail of a man who may have taken revenge on a childhood friend.

programme.title: The First 48: Motel No-Tell/ Brotherly Love
programme.desc: In Memphis, Sergeants Ron Collins and Kevin Lundy must track down a murder suspect who may have fled the state. In Dallas, Det. Phil Harding investigates the brutal shooting that killed a 22-year-old.

programme.title: The First 48: A Simple Plan/ Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: An attempted car jacking in Cleveland leaves an innocent man shot dead. Then, a home invasion turns deadly when a woman is murdered in front of her daughter.

programme.title: The First 48: Murder Rap
programme.desc: When a bullied teen is gunned down outside a public library, Cleveland Detectives are shocked to discover the motive behind this senseless attack.

programme.title: The First 48: Best Laid Plans/ Burned Alive
programme.desc: In Harris County, a young woman set on fire clings to life as deputies race to find who left her for dead. In Cleveland, when a teenager is shot down in the street, detectives discover his best friends may have something to do with the murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Obsession/ The Killer You Know
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers embark on a manhunt after the murder of a young couple. The search for the cold-blooded killer takes them across three states. In Cleveland, a man is shot in his own backyard.

programme.title: The First 48: Graveyard Love
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a man is ambushed in front of his grandmother's house. Detectives suspect a woman close to the victim may have arranged the shooting, but they need hard evidence to prove it, and quickly before it's too late.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: Easter
programme.desc: From butter lambs to Jesus beards, learn how to prepare for the perfect Easter. Amy gives a glimpse into all her Easter traditions, her bi-annual egg hunt and her delicious Easter brunch. This year she has a special guest join her.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.desc: In order to broaden her stand-up routine and put on a big show at the Pittsfield Theatre, Mary enlists the help of Emma Willmann.

programme.title: Botched: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Paul follows a hunch and orders more tests for a woman with a severely botched nose and discovers shocking news. The doctors work in tandem to get two 'botched bunnies' back in centerfold shape.

programme.title: Botched: Say Yes to the Breasts

programme.title: Botched: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The doctors help a woman whose nose was botched by the 'House of Horrors.' Also, Tanya hopes to remove a scar that reminds her of her unborn twin and the infamous Sarah Burge visits the doctors to find eternal youth.

programme.title: Botched: Attack of the 3,000cc Implants

programme.title: Botched: Muscles, Tucks and Forehead Flaps
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif takes on a patient who tried to treat her own skin cancer and ended up with a hole in her nose while Dr. Dubrow tackles a body builder's deflated breast.

programme.title: Botched: 2,000CCs and Counting

programme.title: Botched: Playground Trauma and a Pint-Sized Mama

programme.title: Cat vs. Dog: My Animals Are Going to Get Me Evicted!
programme.desc: Jackson and Zoe meet Tami, whose three dogs terrorize her two cats, Esmeralda Beyonce and Cozy Cosette. Tami's solution? A rooftop cat sanctuary atop her guest house, complete with scratching posts, food and water stations and lawn chairs.

programme.title: Cat vs. Dog: Vampire Cats
programme.desc: Jackson and Zoe meet two cats never seen in daytime. To escape the three giant dogs they live with, the cats are living inside cabinets. Our experts also work with a divided family, half of whom insist their beloved dog is terrorized by their cat.

programme.title: Cat vs. Dog: I'm Afraid of My Dog!
programme.desc: Jackson and Zoe meet Juli and her son Braylen, who must work to overcome unfounded fears of their protection dog Ernie, a Cane Corso Mastiff. Our experts also encounter Bug, an overweight cat who supposedly bullies Mushu, a Maltese-Poodle mix.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Good Kitty, Bad Kitty
programme.desc: Jackson comes to the defense of Good Kitty, a feline who he must help stand up to her two feline attackers. The Cat Daddy also encounters a couple fed up with the way their cats, Tiki and Marley, are eating everything in sight.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fluffy's Last Stand
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are being torn apart by their cat, Missy, who's determined to kill their other cat Fluffy. Jackson meets a tortie named Candy, who's beating up a nine-year-old because she isn't so sweet.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Bad Max
programme.desc: Jackson works on the behavior of a hyperactive cat named Mr. Weasley. However, when this Persian cat goes down mid-play, the story takes a completely different turn; Jackson figures out how to move an exiled cat indoors.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Lucifer the Cat
programme.desc: Jackson's in Jersey to help a single mom whose cat, Pickles, is terrifying her kids. The Cat Daddy works with Lucifer, a cat whose devilish food obsession and constant pursuit to eat just might cost him his life.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Posey the Terror
programme.desc: Jackson faces the highest stakes of the series when he experiences the vicious claws of a troubled cat who's terrorizing a family about to bring home a newborn baby; Jackson meets an inspirational cat named Skinny; Jackson meets Cole and Marmalade.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Ferocious Foster
programme.desc: Jackson meets an outdoor cat named Henry, who having been forced to live inside, has protested by soaking the place in pee. A desperate foster guardian resorts to Jackson as her only hope to save a cat from being euthanized.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Meow Mates
programme.desc: Jackson guides a defeated couple and their cat who has been locked away for over a year. He visits a "Cat-Bassador" who works with his guardian to help special needs cats find forever homes. And Jackson visits an incredible prison program.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Moving Homes

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hot Air Buffoon
programme.desc: The shop heats up after Corey spends tons of cash buying a 12-person hot air balloon and breaks one of Rick's golden rules in the process.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: License to Pawn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars look to buy an 1862 Civil War postage stamp that is encased in a coin shaped holder.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bugs Money
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get revved up when they check out a classic 1941 Indian motorcycle. A woman comes by with a golf club once owned by the King of Cool himself, Dean Martin. A Bugs Bunny poster signed by Mel Blanc is brought in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Crosby, Stills and Cash
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are blown away when a pair of WWII bomb fins drop into the shop. A guy brings in a Martin guitar signed by '60s super group Crosby, Stills and Nash.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Free Agent
programme.desc: Lock and load with the Pawn Stars when a D. Moore pistol from the Civil War shoots into the shop. They also put a team together to compete in a quiz competition.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Colt to the Touch
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a '51 Chevy driven by Steve McQueen in his last movie. Then, a man has a Colt .45 he claims was used to kill Jesse James.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Off the Hook
programme.desc: The guys check out a collection of sketches from the 1954 Sam Sheppard trial. The man who inspired 'The Fugitive,' is Rick willing to deliver a verdict on these rare drawings?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Head Games
programme.desc: Pendants from the first two Super Bowls come into the shop. Rick and Corey check out a pair of Igorot spears. And later, the Old Man gets flooded with birthday gifts.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tag Team
programme.desc: A Bible that belonged to Mickey Mantle throws Corey a curveball. Then, a customer brings Rick a pen President Johnson used to sign Medicare into law. Later, the guys start a competition that tests their buying skills.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Death and Taxidermy
programme.desc: Get spooked out with the Pawn Stars when a 1547 edition of 'The Dance of Death' haunts the shop. Next, things get whimsical when two sculptures from Dr. Seuss' unorthodox taxidermy collection are brought in. A tear-gas baton forces its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cowboys and Cannons
programme.desc: A 19th century sun dial cannon, a signed helmet from one of Hollywood's biggest flops, Heaven's Gate, sterling silver baby figurines, a 1964 Beatles board game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Samurais and Centerfolds
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars learn the way of the samurai when Rick and Chumlee come to grips with a valuable Japanese katana from the 1800s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Oh Holy Pawn
programme.desc: Rick gets the opportunity to purchase a page from the Gutenberg Bible, the first printed book. Corey finds a rare six-sheet movie poster from the classic 'Ziegfeld Follies.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned at the Stake
programme.desc: Something wicked to the shop comes when an 18th century 'Tryal of Witches' book finds its way there. Rick checks out a 20th century airplane control yoke and a gold-plated banjo. The guys evaluate a restored car from the film 'Wanye's World.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Masonic Pawn
programme.desc: Rick gets his hands on a hat worn by Prince and considers the sale. An Egyptian scarab ring scuttles into the shop for evaluation. A WWII era head-shaped glass planter also visits the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Killer Pawn
programme.desc: A signed shower curtain by Anthony Perkins; an 1882 Gold Certificate and 1918 Federal Reserve note; an 1800s Millionaire Calculator; a 1950s Russian night vision scope.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Houston, We Have A Deal
programme.desc: A lunar Bible from Apollo 14; a 1930s Buck Rogers Disintegrator Gun; miniature samples of a 1950s kitchen; a 1950s Beetle Bailey original print.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Highly Explosive Pawn
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck when a British Navy gunpowder bucket blasts into the shop and a seller approaches the Pawn Stars to present them with a past prop from 'Back to the Future, Part II.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Boats and Bros
programme.desc: As Rick and Chum continue their adventures in Michigan, Rick gambles on a WWI helmet and a RC Cola machine. Back at the shop, Corey deals with a 'Rocky III' statue.

programme.title: Movie: Les Girls
programme.desc: A woman writes a tell-all book about her days as a dancer for the 'Barry Nichols and Les Girls' dance troupe. The story is presented from three different views when she gets sued for slander until Barry decides to reveal the true story.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Evidence Never Lies
programme.desc: A young woman is found drowned in her bathtub and the evidence at the crime scene indicates her killer was someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Notes from a Killer
programme.desc: When a young girl disappears off a quiet suburban street, it marks the beginning of a terrifying game of cat and mouse between police and her abductor.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Trail of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple mysteriously disappears, police must piece together a shocking trail of betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In The Dead of Night
programme.desc: Police must retrace a teenager's last known movements if they hope to find out when and where she crossed paths with her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Haunting Memories
programme.desc: When a college student goes missing from a mall parking lot, police are convinced foul play is behind her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: While Her Children Slept
programme.desc: After a four-year-old girl finds her mother's lifeless body, police must try to unravel a puzzling mystery. A murder investigation in which they must rule out multiple solid suspects before they arrive at the unlikely killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Murder in Store
programme.desc: A young woman is murdered inside the video game store she managed by a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Searching for Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Nikki McPhatter has a busy work and social life, but there's only one thing missing true love. When she doesn't show up for her usual work shift, her friends and family immediately worry -- and point to her online relationships.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Cyber Psycho
programme.desc: For lonely realtor Mary Kay Beckman the dream of finding love through internet dating sites becomes a living nightmare when a relationship with a seemingly charming online admirer turns in to a race against time to track down a psychopath.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lies and Death
programme.desc: The facade of perfection thrives until a mystery gunman blows away an all-American girl and her wealthy doctor husband.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death for Dessert
programme.desc: Sparks fly when picture-perfect divorcés Tami and Alan meet at a wedding - within months they're married too. But when Tami starts uses her sultry good looks to get what she wants from every man she meets, one of them will end up dead.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death of a Salesman
programme.desc: John Parker marries Judy, a nice girl from the wrong side of the tracks. John uses his wealth and status to keep his new wife happy. But Judy's rumored romantic entanglements with a string of John's employees prove to be too much for John to bear.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Ambition to Die For
programme.desc: Dino's long work hours and missing bail jumper make his wife suspicious. Then a hidden secret is revealed.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Smith: The Two-Fisted Marshal of Abeline
programme.desc: Using his fists instead of a pistol, professional boxer turned frontier lawman Tom Smith is determined to clean up 'Hell on Earth.' This is the little known story of one of the greatest lawmen of the Wild West.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Jelly Bryce: The Perfect Shot
programme.desc: With outlaws firing machine guns in the streets of Oklahoma City, sharp-shooting legend Delf 'Jelly' Bryce is on a collision course with some of the most violent men in America.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Engagement Renovation
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Missy and Devon are looking to purchase their first home together in Ormond-by-the-Sea, Florida. With their wedding months away, the project threatens to be too much for the young couple to handle.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Helping Hands
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders help out folks in need including Boy Scouts in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hitting the Barnwood Jackpot
programme.desc: Mark's client wants to use the barnwood from an enormous Pennsylvania bank barn to outfit his Arizona restaurant. It's a beast of a job in the middle of a heat wave, but the Barnwood Builders just won't quit.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Montana Barn Battle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders square off against their toughest barn yet- a stubborn old timber frame with wooden pegs, metal spikes, steel bolts and a whole lot of beams. But saving this barn is worth the effort because it will be rebuilt for a veterans group.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Fireside Retreat With a Rustic Feel
programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Southern Plantation-Style Deck
programme.desc: A couple wants to add a deck to their home in Louisiana. The current deck is rotting and offers no protection from the heat or insect, so Garth's plantation-style design includes enclosed rooms and air conditioning.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: In Garth We Trust
programme.desc: A half-finished deck means a call for Garth to deliver the deck of one couples dreams. But to make their dream work, he needs to cut down a few trees, which the owners are unsure of.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse
programme.desc: Pete constructs an amazing clubhouse for Sunrise Day Camp: a summer camp for kids battling cancer. This open-air treehouse grants campers full interaction with nature by erasing the line between indoors and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Merry Fishmas!
programme.desc: Pete heads to Dogwood Canyon, a 10,000 acre nature preserve in Missouri. Despite a tight Christmas deadline, Pete and his team create a two-story hands-on learning haven with a giant copper-topped turret that can endure thousands of visitors.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers that cheddar chimneys make him twist and shout at Burlington’s Sound of Music Festival and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the redneck taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tons of Taters
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Family Dinner
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe takes a seat at the table for family dinner, carnival style.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fries in Disguise
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Volusia County Fair in Florida, where two carnival classics get a makeover for the cheesy tater corndog and the black forest funnel cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dude, Where's My Carb?
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes on the Porter County Fair in Indiana, where a pile of locally sourced pork is served three ways in a single dish.

programme.title: Food Paradise: At the Drive-In
programme.desc: From crispy, juicy fried chicken and hearty chili cheese fries to zesty taco burgers and deep-fried hot dogs, diners are pulling up for a taste of Americana.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Off-the-chain Eats
programme.desc: From a 14-pound mountain of nachos and a barbecue a sandwich as mighty as the Mississippi to a two-pork punch of a breakfast burrito, these citywide franchises have gone off the chain.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Working Actors Eat, Too
programme.desc: Tia shares her tricks to balancing her hectic schedule as a full-time mom and working actress. She takes us behind the scenes while bringing homemade treats to her hair and make-up team on the set of her new show.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Girls' Night
programme.desc: It's all about the throwback when Tia cooks some of her favorite recipes for her favorite girlfriends.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: A Slam Dunk of a Day
programme.desc: Today is all about slam dunks with Tia's son, Cree, his friends and their moms. NBA All-Star player, Metta World Peace, surprises them with some basketball lessons and Tia herself jerseys-up for some one-on-one action.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Tia & Cory Cook-Off
programme.desc: Tia & Cory to set up a cook-off to settle once and for all who is the master of the kitchen.

programme.title: Simply Laura: All Day Breakfast
programme.desc: Laura's inspired to create an all-day breakfast menu. She prepares creme fraiche and veggie frittata, smoked salmon and dill quiche and a breakfast bruschetta bar.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Girls' Day and Night!
programme.desc: Laura spends a full day with her girls before heading out for some shopping and pampering she tackles some finger foods that she can assemble before the fun.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: South of the Border
programme.desc: We head South of the Border for Bobby's Mexican themed brunch with his version of Huevos Rancheros with Chorizo and a spicy Tomato-Red Chile Sauce.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Slumber Party
programme.desc: When Bobby's daughter Sophie has a sleepover it can only mean one thing... dad's in the kitchen cooking up brunch for everyone! This fun and tasty menu starts with an apple pie oatmeal with bruleed crust that's sure to wake up your taste buds.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Weekend Staycation
programme.desc: A weekend staycation brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's home! Bobby's kitchen is the destination for a cozy menu of crunchy maple topped oatmeal, avocado salmon benedict, cinnamon sugar mini pancake muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocoholic Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is covering the kitchen in chocolate for a luscious menu of sweet and savory treats like dark chocolate waffles with white chocolate custard sauce and espresso-chocolate whipped cream.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: Discover a Forth Worth Tex Mex Burrito almost as big as the state of Texas itself.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pizza Party
programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.
