programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's New Mouse House/Millie and Melody's Sleepover!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals finish building Mickey's brand new house! Millie and Melody have a birthday sleepover at Minnie and Daisy's vacation house!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wolfy Powers / Do The Gekko
programme.desc: After their powers are stolen and given to the Woflies, the PJ Masks ally with them to vanquish Romeo. Night Ninja hypnotizes all of the school kids with his special ninja dance!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Good, The Bad, and the Froggy/ Muppet Rock
programme.desc: The Muppet Babies go on a Wild West adventure. The Muppet Babies form their own rock band.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Timmy's Secret Wish
programme.desc: Timmy makes his millionth wish so all of Fairyworld has gathered to celebrate. But after reviewing all the wishes Timmy has made, the Fairy Council finds that he should be put on trial for being the worst godkid ever.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cat and Mouse/ Chip off the Old Crock
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe have to help a depressed Catman prove to his girlfriend that he's a real superhero. Mr. Crocker teaches his nephew to be a FAIRY catcher.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Friends and Neighbors/ Just the Two of Us
programme.desc: Timmy's parents don't have many friends; Timmy and Trixie are the last two people on Earth

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Truth or Cosmoquences/ Beach Bummed
programme.desc: Cosmo wants help impressing people at his reunion; Timmy wishes he were stronger.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.desc: The Rangers are skeptical when Steel says he's found clues that prove Evox may have returned.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Blame Game

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nasty Patty/ Idiot Box

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Battle in the Skies!

programme.desc: Devoted to the Victorian age, which gave birth to modern baking. The Signature test is game pie, a stalwart of the era. The Technical recipe, fruitcake, dates to the late 1800s. And much-loved charlotte russe is the Showstopper.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: Tracey eventually uncovers the truth as Woody discovers something that can't be hidden. Shay gets more unwelcome attention from Ollie.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George longs for solitude but his plan to get rid of his unwanted guests backfires.

programme.title: Jamestown
programme.desc: Jamestown’s first baby brings joy to the settlement but the discovery of a terrible crime throws suspicion upon all inhabitants. When Jocelyn’s position in the colony comes under threat, she forges a surprising new connection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Recut: Newport 1
programme.desc: Experience Roadshow's ground-breaking visit to Rosecliff mansion when, for the first time, it takes the cameras indoors and outdoors.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: The Burrowers/ Shiny's Sea Shells
programme.desc: The Pteranodon family meets dinosaurs that live in holes and put on an acrobatic show every evening.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: Step This Way/ Anything You Can Do
programme.desc: Emily the teal, Mikey the lemur and Greg the gecko show the kids their differently shaped feet.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Monster
programme.desc: Intelligence is on the track of a pill mill spreading in the suburbs of Chicago and the doctor enabling it after the death of Judge Tommy Wells' daughter leads them to it. Voight discovers who had been leaking the 21st's information.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Halstead and Camila's partying puts him in the middle of a drug-related homicide, forcing him to choose between his loyalty to his unit and his girl. Voight discovers the mole in his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Confidential
programme.desc: While trying to find the pimp, Intelligence discovers the women's shelter where he scouts girls. Burgess moves the case forward with a series of confidential tips but risks putting her informant in harm's way.

programme.title: WWE Raw
programme.desc: Great athletes and electrifying performers from the world of sports entertainment.

programme.title: Modern Family: When Good Kids Go Bad
programme.desc: Lily strongly disagrees with Mitchell and Cameron when they announce their plan to adopt another child. Manny is suspected of stealing a locket from school, and Jay tries to get him to confess. Claire goes to the extremes to prove she is right.

programme.title: Modern Family: New Year's Eve
programme.desc: The family goes to a hotel in Palm Springs to celebrate New Year's, which turns out to be less than stellar. Everyone ends up doing their own thing, and Jay runs into Billy Dee Williams. Meanwhile at home, Haley and Alex watch over the kids.

programme.title: Modern Family: Heart Broken
programme.desc: A fun Valentine's Day romp between Phil and Claire's alter egos, Clive Bixby and Juliana, takes an unexpected turn that lands Claire in the hospital and with a diagnosis that she doesn't take lying down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: Claire flies solo to her college reunion and runs into a professor she once dated, but when Phil shows up things get really awkward. Back at home, Jay is obsessed with winning his big bowling tournament.

programme.title: Modern Family: Best Men
programme.desc: Cam and Mitch are made last-minute best men for their best gal pal's wedding. Meanwhile, Gloria has trust issues with their new nanny, Claire has a bonding moment with Haley and Phil helps Luke with a girl he likes.

programme.title: Modern Family: Flip Flop
programme.desc: Phil is pretty confident in his ability to sell Claire and Cam's flipped house, but when it proves to be a little harder than he thought, he recruits the whole family into taking some desperate, borderline crazy measures.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Thing About Heroes
programme.desc: After a van explodes during a Chicago street festival, Muslim patrol officer Frank Toma goes missing and evidence piles up pointing to his involvement, but Burgess is desperate to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Dateline: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: Hollywood stuntman, Garrett Warren, was shot four times but luckily survived. With many suspects in mind, see if Warren knew who was trying to kill him.

programme.title: Dateline: Along Came Jodi
programme.desc: A man and woman had chemistry right from the start. Then he was killed and she was arrested. The trial riveted millions, exposing Jodi's secret.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dancing Tween
programme.desc: Grayson is invited to his first dance and Todd and Julie are conflicted about him growing up. Meanwhile, Todd puts Savannah's and Nanny Faye's driving skills to the test in Savannah's new ride.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Frame by Frame
programme.desc: The team investigates a homicide in the home of a reclusive former casino mogul who was a suspect in a similar crime in 2000. The team needs to recall who they were and where they were in order to solve the cold case.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Revenge Deferred
programme.desc: After extensive surveillance footage of Sam's family is found in Africa, Sam and Callen fly there to determine who is responsible and for what purpose. Also, Sam's family is moved from their home to safe house.

programme.title: NCIS: Recovery
programme.desc: The body of the NCIS facilities manager is found four months after the navy yard bombings, leading the team to investigate the cause of her mysterious death. Gibbs is most concerned about Abby's recurring nightmares since the bombing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rotten
programme.desc: Guards are suspects in the sexual assault and beating death of a drug dealer in prison.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pandora

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Sick

programme.desc: Blanche is dreading her birthday and Dorothy helps Sophia with 'Meals on Wheels.'

programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 11, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss
programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 15, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.desc: Stan and Kyle are psyched to have Wendy and Bebe visit their clubhouse for a game of 'Truth or Dare,' but first they have to build one. When they won't let Carman join, he and Kenny build their own clubhouse and invite teenage girls to play with them.

programme.title: South Park: The Mexican Staring Frog of Southern Sri Lanka

programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.desc: Kyle and Stan's friendship is strained after they discover a man frozen in an ice cave and have differing opinions about what is best for their 'discovery.'

programme.desc: After the stabbing death of a woman who was apparently killed by someone wearing a ninja outfit, Brenda and the squad realize they might have a bigger case on their hands than they thought.

programme.title: The Closer: Make Over

programme.title: The Closer: Dead Man's Hand
programme.desc: Captain Raydor approaches Major Crime about looking into a possible case of spousal abuse involving one of her female officers. Brenda and Raydor discover there is more to the story when another officer kills the abused woman's husband.

programme.desc: Follows interns as they complete their first day of a difficult surgical residency at Seattle Grace Hospital.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The First Cut Is the Deepest
programme.desc: The surgical staff tries to be optimistic as a woman clings to life after a brutal attack.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: No Man's Land
programme.desc: Christina is deeply affected by a patient; Izzie's medical skills are questioned.

programme.desc: Meredith thinks she made a mistake in surgery; Alex has a patient addicted to painkillers.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: If Tomorrow Never Comes

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Yeager Bombs
programme.desc: MSO prepares to face off against some local racers led by the fast-talking Tony Yeager. Tensions are high thanks to MSO's history with their competition that includes some unfinished business between Mustang Mike, Anthony Smith and two of the locals.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Road Block
programme.desc: Big-mouth South Carolina street racer Chris Block returns and he's brought with him team of all-stars that are hungry for MSO's money.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Knock Your Block Off
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: Larger-than-life Chris Block and his South Carolina racers challenge MSO to a small-tire competition. Memphis has little time to prepare and must adapt quickly if they want to stand a chance.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Tired of Big Tire
programme.desc: The MSO switches to small tires hoping to attract new challengers and must work together to outrun Tim White and his small-tire killers from Illinois. Then a list of tough small-tire racers are ready to line up and give Memphis a run for their money.

programme.desc: Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Dieselsellerz crew scramble to finish a six-door stretched F650 Expedition Camper for a big client. And Heavy D shocks the team with his latest flip- a diesel-powered experimental helicopter.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: No Mercy
programme.desc: Tempers flare onboard Wizard and Northwestern; Time Bandit has a dangerous electrical short; on Cornelia Marie, Phil's health deteriorates and Early Dawn runs headlong into high seas when its greenhorn falls asleep at the wheel.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Racing the Clock
programme.desc: With a few weeks left in king crab season, the fate of every deckhand's pay cheque sits squarely on his captain's shoulders; Time Bandit's Capt. Johnathan has had good fishing but a string of bad luck for crew and boat; the North American returns to duty.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Seeking the Catch
programme.desc: King Crab season ticks down and mass amounts of stinging jellyfish cause complications.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: No Season for Old Men
programme.desc: As the King Crab season comes to an end, a deck accident slows down the Northwestern; Cornelia Marie's power outage comes at an inopportune time; North American does a 'Hail Mary' play and Wizard and Time Bandit race for the 'String of the Week' prize.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Storm Season
programme.desc: Opilio season begins; a dual storm system challenges a patched Cornelia Marie and almost costs Time Bandit two men; a medical emergency brings in the U.S. Coast Guard, but freezing spray puts everyone's lives at risk.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blow Up
programme.desc: A routine Coast Guard rescue becomes a battle against nature; Cornelia Marie heads to land for repairs; fatigue is causing mistakes on Northwestern; on the Wizard, Greenhorn Moi locks horns with Capt. Keith and Time Bandit heads for better grounds.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Big Weather, Big Trouble
programme.desc: Captain Jonathan joins the deck crew on Time Bandit and promptly has an accident while showing off his skills. The Northwestern crew is irritating Captain Sig and Lenny from Wizard barely escapes a huge wave.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Mortal Men
programme.desc: Massive storm waves tear up the decks of the Early Dawn, North American, and Northwestern. On Cornelia Marie, Capt. Phil injures his ribs and begins coughing blood, but he won't head in for medical attention until his crew refuses to work.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Fresh Blood
programme.desc: Capt. Phil heads for the hospital, so Murray struggles to take over the helm of the Cornelia Marie. The Northwestern strains its crane to the breaking point and destabilizes the ship. Wizard springs a serious leak. Greenhorn Moi gets the ax.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Changing Tides
programme.desc: Northwestern fights the ice pack; the Wizard sets off with tempers flaring; Phil's future on Cornelia Marie is questionable, so the crew struggles on without their captain and Time Bandit makes a near fatal mistake and a tough choice.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Catch as Catch Can
programme.desc: Arctic ice pack descends as the fleet makes its final push; Northwestern's Captain Sig and Wizard's Captain Keith battle freezing spray; Cornelia Marie's crew suffers from 'Bering Sea dementia' while Time Bandit's crew is at its breaking point.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Final Hour
programme.desc: The captains race to catch the last of their remaining quotas, battling ice and equipment issues. Time Bandit's Scottie makes a near fatal mistake working the hydraulic system. An ominous message comes across the radio as the men head for homeports.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Into the Red
programme.desc: Co-captains Jake and Johnathan try to form an alliance with rival Keith Colburn. Junior risks crossing into Russian waters for golden crab and Josh bets it all on a gut feeling. Later, Wild Bill turns to his last resort and seeks work in Russia.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: While the Busbys Are Away the Quints Will Play!
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle head to Nashville, leaving the family to watch the quints. But they may not be up to the challenge, especially when Hazel gives her uncle a big scare. While away, Adam confronts the fact he's not the only one suffering from his issues.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Home is Where the Cart Is

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Kate
programme.desc: Dumpster diver Kate takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: An insider's look at the most outrageous penny-pinching people around and their inventive ways to save money.

programme.title: Extreme Time Cheaters

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: The Flu Scare

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Family Under Construction

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Web of Destruction

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.desc: Rachel may be falling for her ex-fiancé Barry, an orthodontist; Chandler has girl trouble.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ick Factor
programme.desc: Monica dates a college boy who thinks she is his age, but she is the one who is surprised.

programme.desc: While Ross is away in China, Rachel learns that he has been in love with her for years.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's New Girlfriend

programme.title: Mom: Free Therapy and a Dead Lady's Yard Sale
programme.desc: Family secrets come out when Christy and Bonnie are asked to join Violet's therapy session.

programme.title: Mom: Godzilla and a Sprig of Mint

programme.title: Mom: Nudes and a Six-Day Cleanse
programme.desc: After realizing she's been a waitress longer than she planned, Christy takes steps towards a new career. Also, Bonnie and Alvin try to recapture their youth.

programme.desc: George seeks out a stray canine companion for his depressed mother.

programme.desc: D. J. receives her learner's permit to drive, but her father, Danny, is afraid to let her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Mayor's Race/ Pups Save an Outlaws Loot
programme.desc: Skye must help rescue Mayor Humdinger, who gets caught up in his own foul schemes. Later, Ryder and Mayor Goodway sort through the old cabin of Outlaw Wild Wilbur when they come across a map for his buried treasure.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Bedtime/ Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the PAW Patrol, but their phone cut out. Chickaletta laid an egg, but it rolled away and is heading through town. The PAW Patrol has to catch it before it breaks.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ready, Race, Rescue

programme.title: After the First 48: Brother's Blood
programme.desc: When a Honduran immigrant was found stabbed to death in his Miami apartment, his brother claimed it was a suicide, but as investigators dug deeper, all evidence pointed to the surviving brother.

programme.title: The First 48: Birthday Girl
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a 14-year-old girl is killed at her birthday party when gunmen open fire on a crowd. With multiple shooters to track down, the homicide team races against the clock to identify which people at the party were the killers.

programme.title: The First 48: Last Birthday
programme.desc: In Cincinnati, a well-loved 58-year-old man is found shot dead in a hallway. When detectives visit the grief-stricken wife, they learn the victim was murdered a day before his birthday.

programme.title: The First 48: The Boogie Man/ Murder on Flowering Peach
programme.desc: A victim whose body was found in the charred remains of a car lead a dangerous lifestyle and had questionable friends. Memphis police cross state lines into Mississippi to track the person responsible for a home invasion that left one man dead.

programme.title: The First 48: The Run Around/ Night Cap
programme.desc: Witnesses hide more than they reveal when a man is shot in his car while parked at a local mini market. A surveillance tape at a bar may reveal a clue to the murder of a young man who was shot.

programme.title: The First 48: Massacre in Little Haiti/ Exposed
programme.desc: A massacre outside a corner store leaves two dead and two clinging to life in Miami. In Cleveland, a man is found strangled in his apartment.

programme.title: The First 48: Taken
programme.desc: When a young man and his pregnant fiancée are executed after a failed ransom attempt, Atlanta Homicide will stop at nothing to identify the elusive suspect.

programme.title: The First 48: Love Kills/ Chasing Shadows
programme.desc: Detectives find surveillance video that shows them more than they expected after a 32-year-old family man is found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: The First 48: Ditched/ Misstep
programme.desc: In Birmingham, motorists discover a decomposed body on the side of the interstate. In Charlotte, detectives try to find the killers of a man shot behind his girlfriend's house.

programme.title: The First 48: Night Run
programme.desc: When a young father is ambushed by a pack of brazen shooters, Atlanta Detective Summer Benton uncovers the shocking reason for his murder.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: Professional Help
programme.desc: Mary and Deb meet with business consultants to help Tirdy Works grow. Meanwhile, back at home, Katie expresses interest in joining the wrestling team.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: Technology
programme.desc: Get a guide to social media, learn to get your emial inbox down to zero, and see who wins when humans take on robots in bartending, nail-art, and food delivery.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Inner Child

programme.desc: Living in the world's most idyllic places is no holiday for many animals. This is fiercely contested real estate and the hunting grounds of some truly terrifying and deadly creatures.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Haunting in the Heartland
programme.desc: New discoveries of a cluster of UFO sightings in the American heartland suggest a government cover-up, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate why so many sightings are occurring in such a remote area.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Search for a Second Earth
programme.desc: Astronomers seek the answer to a second earth with spectroscopy, direct imaging and telescopes. They hope to find evidence of atmospheres, magnetospheres and signs of life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: NASA's Journey to Mars
programme.desc: NASA is on a mission to send humans to Mars within just 15 years, but to reach this next frontier of space exploration, experts must discover brand-new technology and cutting-edge science that protects astronauts from the Red Planet's deadliest killers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of the Turin Shroud
programme.desc: The Turin Shroud is believed to be the burial cloth of Jesus and proof of his existence, but skeptics disagree. Experts investigate this ancient relic to determine if the shroud is genuine, or one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bored to Death
programme.desc: When Opal Skidmore marries Steven Williams, their love is a second chance for the pair to live out their dreams. Until boredom and the lure of the open road spark hidden desires and sexual hijinks leaving this open marriage anything but happy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Reduced to Ash
programme.desc: Julie and Keith's relationship stands the test of time. But after thirty-five years together, a profound restlessness seeps into their union's foundation. As these lifelong partners pursue very private adventures, their once fiery love is reduced to ash.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Outranks Love
programme.desc: It's a military match made in heaven for Roger and Margorie. But a tangled nest of financial secrets and twisted lies ruins the young couple's future. And while the rise of their careers and romance seems meteoric, the ensuing fall is deadly.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder in the Mortuary
programme.desc: Julie Bowling stares down death every day as a cancer therapist and part-time funeral home worker. When she's killed while her husband is out of town, the focus turns to his secret life and shaky finances.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: 30 Years Searching
programme.desc: In 1989, 18-year-old Amanda 'Mandy' Stavik disappeared while jogging in her rural Washington hometown; and later, police discovered her body in a nearby river. Nearly 30 years later this cold case is finally solved.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: 30 Years Searching
programme.desc: In 1989, 18-year-old Amanda 'Mandy' Stavik disappeared while jogging in her rural Washington hometown; and later, police discovered her body in a nearby river. Nearly 30 years later this cold case is finally solved.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder in the Mortuary
programme.desc: Julie Bowling stares down death every day as a cancer therapist and part-time funeral home worker. When she's killed while her husband is out of town, the focus turns to his secret life and shaky finances.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: 30 Years Searching
programme.desc: In 1989, 18-year-old Amanda 'Mandy' Stavik disappeared while jogging in her rural Washington hometown; and later, police discovered her body in a nearby river. Nearly 30 years later this cold case is finally solved.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: 30 Years Searching
programme.desc: In 1989, 18-year-old Amanda 'Mandy' Stavik disappeared while jogging in her rural Washington hometown; and later, police discovered her body in a nearby river. Nearly 30 years later this cold case is finally solved.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Obsession Has Its Price
programme.desc: Bill Douglas is a respected doctor at Tufts University in Boston. But his focus isn't on science – it's on a bombshell prostitute he met in a red light district called the Combat Zone. Together, they lead double lives… leading to someone's murder.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Ruby and John Ruffolo's marriage is threatened when John's legal troubles drive him to multiple infidelities. Leaving a streak of scorned women in his wake, John mysteriously disappears. And the hunt for him reveals a deprave reality no one saw coming.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Professor Bill Douglas falls for high-end call girl Robin after his marriage to Nancy grows stale. But when Bill struggles to pay Robin and Nancy learns about the affair, the Professor is caught in a situation he can't lecture his way out of.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Confident, motorcycle-riding Diane Snellen is a single mom trying to make her way in the world while navigating the dating scene of Georgetown, KY. But her path in life comes to an abrupt end when she's brutally stabbed in her own home.

programme.title: Betrayed: Coed Killer
programme.desc: Angela Samota is every coed's dream come true. She's smart, beautiful, and always the epicenter of every room she enters - but one day she's noticed by the wrong person, and it leads to her ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: 17-year-old Mary Jayne Jones is full of nubile innocence when she moves to small town Iowa and gets a job waiting tables. She trusts that there's good in everyone... but she's wrong. And it's a mistake that will cost Jayne her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Family Matters
programme.desc: Puppy love is thwarted when a teen boy's traditional parents try to keep the young couple apart by moving him to another country. But the distance only serves to make his heart grow fonder and he'll stop at nothing to be reunited with his girl.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A teen girl forbidden from dating falls hard for an older man. In a desperate bid to be with him, she runs away from home. But young love soon turns to fatal obsession.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Is War
programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love and Dishonor
programme.desc: When Montreal teen Zainab Shafia meets Ammar Wahid, it's love at first sight. But their relationship is forbidden by her strict father and he'll stop at nothing to ensure his daughter obeys his rules of honor.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The 22-Year Itch
programme.desc: In January 2003, Curt and Donna Thorngren's 22-year marriage, destroyed by debt, deceit, and drug addiction, ended in murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Wangler and his wife Kathy appear to be living the middle-class dream: two sons, financial security, and a strong faith. But on September 4th, 2006, their façade falls down around them as a cold pre-meditated execution tears their family apart.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love, Sex, and Trucking
programme.desc: Frances and Bill Hall Jr. appear to be the perfect couple two kids, a successful business, and a 30-year marriage. But on October 13, 2013, an unexpected encounter leads to a fatality, and the investigation reveals a story of infidelity and obsession.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Three Pops and a Pause
programme.desc: Ashlee and Emmett Corrigan seem to have it all; true love, five beautiful children, and a growing business. But in March 2011, an explosive encounter blows their lives apart in an instant, revealing their marriage is not what it seemed.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mindbending Silver Maple
programme.desc: Inspired by tales of a time long past, Pete builds a treehouse cradled by the stems of a twisty silver maple on the shore of Lake Chelan. The cedar-shingled structure has a curved turret that soars two storeys high and a deck to take in views of the lake.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad
programme.desc: Pete heads to the Platte River Valley of eastern Nebraska to build a magical, towering treetop castle for a family that has decided to never grow up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 10 Most Challenging Builds
programme.desc: This week the Cabin Masters take a look back and count down the top ten Most Challenging Builds.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 10 Most Challenging Builds

programme.title: Yardcore: Country Comfort Corral
programme.desc: The brothers Moss kick up the cowboy cool starting with a lofty threshing wheel fire feature nestled in a stunning sunken conversation pit. A vast outdoor kitchen features a stone-studded BBQ station and an extra long dining island capped in copper.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool for a Dream Home
programme.desc: The kings create a resort in a family's backyard that includes a waterfall grotto with a slide and infinity edge. Additional elements include a splash pad and sun shelf, transforming the yard from barren to beautiful.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Canyon Country Playground
programme.desc: A big family on a large property wants to replace their old patio and pool with an updated design. Mike and Jim deliver on the dream by transforming the yard into a canyon country playground. The backyard oasis includes a lazy river and a cave.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Sliding Into Paradise
programme.desc: A young Tennessee family's steep backyard has made it impossible to enjoy. Kyle and Justin build a family fun zone that includes a waterfall, a fire pit, and a custom waterslide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple seeks out the kings to help them revamp their worn-out lakeside swimming pool. The guys accept the challenge and turn the eyesore into a backyard paradise complete with a custom slide, secondary pool and more.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce II
programme.desc: No matter how good of a cook you are, sooner or later your seafood is going to let you down. Alton Brown has the sauces that will save your dinner every time.

programme.title: Good Eats: Oh My, Meat Pie
programme.desc: Alton Brown tells the tale of an ancestor's journey to the New World by way of a curious meat pie shop. He explores the origins and preparation of shepherd's pie and mincemeat.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Choux Shine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally turns this old show about pate a choux into what it always should have been: an episode about chocolate eclairs. That means a new pastry cream and a chocolate glaze.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Chuck for Chuck: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' the pot roast from 2001. He's learned a lot since then, and it shows, because this is what pot roast is supposed to be.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: Amy Schumer Learns to Cook: Brunch and Leftovers
programme.desc: Amy and Chris are still in lockdown at home, so they're making brunch. Amy mixes peach Bellinis while Chris walks her through pork sausage and fried eggs. Then, Chris candies his favourite vegetable, fennel, for a perfectly baked sweet scone.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Backyard BBQ
programme.desc: Michael McKean knows that where there's smoke, there's barbecue and he's ready to put the heat to the meat. He's learning how barbecue can boost brainpower, discovering Korean barbecue is anything but and explaining why barbecue brisket may be blessed.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Bon Appetit
programme.desc: Michael McKean is all berets and baguettes as he digs into a few of France's most fantastic feasts. He crosses the pond to see if crepes could nearly kill a king.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: Michael McKean fans the flames of some fiery hot foods. He discovers that flaming-hot vindaloo may have once been far less combustible, wasabi isn't always what it seems and that jerk chicken is good at keeping ghosts away.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds his bearings and heads out into the wild blue yonder. On this appetizing adventure, he'll discover if a classic cobbler helped Lewis and Clark, and whether Girl Scout cookies can save the planet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Paradise Nosh
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds out how poke started cooking without gas, why the Mai Tai became tied to tiki bars and if Hawaiian pizza is from the great white north.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tea Time
programme.desc: Michael McKean has his pinkie out because it's tea time! He's discovering espionage may have bagged us English breakfast, the egg salad sandwich has some complicated chemistry and that matcha tea may be pulling a fast one.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bean Stalker
programme.desc: Alton reinvents the classic green bean casserole just in time to save the holidays.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dillicious
programme.desc: Alton helps a humble cucumber fulfill its culinary destiny of becoming a pickle.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Slicer
programme.desc: Join host Alton Brown as he explores what it takes to stay sharp in the kitchen and demystifies the relationship between the cook and his cutlery, with a recipe for Gazpacho.

programme.title: Good Eats: Puff the Magic Mallow
programme.desc: Alton Brown shares the sweet, sticky science behind homemade marshmallows.

programme.title: Good Eats: Honey I Shrunk the Cake
programme.desc: Alton Brown prepares a chiffon cupcake.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Alton Crown Affair
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that crown roast of lamb can be a dish to shock and awe.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Wing and I
programme.desc: Prepare America's most ubiquitous of bar foods, Buffalo chicken wings.

programme.title: Good Eats: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Alton breaks out the cast iron and uses his hearth and grill to whip up good eats.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Saucy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking scours the U.S. to find 15 of the best dishes that are all about the sauce. There's sticky toffee pudding, super spicy wings, a fondue burger, drunken scallops and even chocolate plus barbecue.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Stars of SpongeBob
